debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

proof:
simp only [Nat.cast_le]
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _)
        intro k hk
        have hk1 : 1 ≤ k := (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk).1
        have hkpos : 0 < k := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mp hk1)
        have hmono := Nat.nth_strictMono Nat.infinite_setOf_prime
        have hp0 : Nat.Prime (nth Nat.Prime 0) := Nat.nth_mem_of_infinite Nat.infinite_setOf_prime 0
        have hp0_ge2 : 2 ≤ nth Nat.Prime 0 := hp0.two_le
        have hp_gt_hp0 : nth Nat.Prime 0 < nth Nat.Prime k := hmono hkpos
        have hp_ge3 : 3 ≤ nth Nat.Prime k := by omega
        have hdenom_pos : 0 < nth Nat.Prime k - 1 := by omega
        have h1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) ≤ 1 := by
          have hp_lt : nth Nat.Prime k < 2 * (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) := by omega
          exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul hdenom_pos |>.mpr hp_lt)
        have h2 : 1 ≤ (k + 1) / k := Nat.one_le_div_iff hkpos |>.mpr (Nat.le_succ k)
        omega
successful_attempts:
simp only [Nat.cast_le]
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _)
        intro k hk
        have hk1 : 1 ≤ k := (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk).1
        have hkpos : 0 < k := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mp hk1)
        have hmono := Nat.nth_strictMono Nat.infinite_setOf_prime
        have hp0 : Nat.Prime (nth Nat.Prime 0) := Nat.nth_mem_of_infinite Nat.infinite_setOf_prime 0
        have hp0_ge2 : 2 ≤ nth Nat.Prime 0 := hp0.two_le
        have hp_gt_hp0 : nth Nat.Prime 0 < nth Nat.Prime k := hmono hkpos
        have hp_ge3 : 3 ≤ nth Nat.Prime k := by omega
        have hdenom_pos : 0 < nth Nat.Prime k - 1 := by omega
        have h1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) ≤ 1 := by
          have hp_lt : nth Nat.Prime k < 2 * (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) := by omega
          exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul hdenom_pos |>.mpr hp_lt)
        have h2 : 1 ≤ (k + 1) / k := Nat.one_le_div_iff hkpos |>.mpr (Nat.le_succ k)
        omega
